Function.Name: WriteInternalRegister
Function.Desc: Writes data to an internal register of the projection module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RegisterAccessTimeoutIrq
Param.Desc: Interrupt is asserted in the scenario where a R/W access fails to complete in the allocated timeout duration.

Param.Name: InitDoneIrq
Param.Desc: FPGA and DMD initialization complete. Ready for SPI communication.

Param.Name: BrownoutIrq
Param.Desc: Brownout detected

Param.Name: VidLoopCompIrq
Param.Desc: Video loop completed. If multiple loops of a video are requested, this interrupt triggers after each completed loop.

Param.Name: VidConfigCompIrq
Param.Desc: Video configuration completed including all requested loops. This triggers once after all loops of a video complete. If both video configurations are requested to be used, it will trigger after each configuration completes (twice).

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: MainStatusSsfPllLocked
Param.Desc: Read-only status 1: SSF PLL locked 0: not locked

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FpgaControlDifTpgEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable DIF TPG function

Param.Name: FpgaControlLdcEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable LDC led and pwm function

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DmdSflip
Param.Desc: 1: enable image flip along DMD short side

Param.Name: DmdLflip
Param.Desc: 1: enable image flip along DMD long side

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtCtrlTrcen
Param.Desc: 1: enable the DMD TRC function

Param.Name: FmtCtrlCmboutswap
Param.Desc: 1: swap comb outputs

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtCmbQueuewrn
Param.Desc: Comb queue warning

Param.Name: FmtCmbCmderr
Param.Desc: Comb command error

Param.Name: FmtCmbMulterr
Param.Desc: Comb mult error

Param.Name: FmtCmbNodataerr
Param.Desc: Comb no data error

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtFrbEmpty
Param.Desc: FRB empty

Param.Name: FmtFrbOverflow
Param.Desc: FRB overflow

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscSwDmdUnpark
Param.Desc: 1: run (normal DMD operation) 0: DMD park

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscParkVcclvFld
Param.Desc: park vcc/vcc2 level

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscMctrlShadowenable
Param.Desc: enable for DAD shadow mode

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlSeqen
Param.Desc: 1: sequencer enable 0: disable

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlVectincen
Param.Desc: 1: Sequence vector auto increment enable

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlSeqvect
Param.Desc: Sequence vector number

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlNumsubvect
Param.Desc: Number of sub-vector

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: SeqbufSelect
Param.Desc: 0: select sequencer buffer 0 1: buffer 1

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RpwmDc
Param.Desc: Red PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: GpwmDc
Param.Desc: Green PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: BpwmDc
Param.Desc: Blue PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: PwmEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable PWM output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VideoFrameRate
Param.Desc: Video frame time in 40MHz clock counts

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: StartAddr1
Param.Desc: Video 1 start address in flash

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FrameCnt1
Param.Desc: Number of frames in video 1 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 frame 2 = 2 frames

Param.Name: LoopCnt1
Param.Desc: Number of times to loop video 1 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 loop 2 = 2 loops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: StartAddr2
Param.Desc: Video 2 start address in flash

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FrameCnt2
Param.Desc: Number of frames in video 2 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 frame 2 = 2 frames

Param.Name: LoopCnt2
Param.Desc: Number of times to loop video 2 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 loop 2 = 2 loops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VcmMaxSeqabort
Param.Desc: Maximum number of allowable sequence aborts before video playback stops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VcmTmsel
Param.Desc: Video controller test mux select

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: NFactor
Param.Desc: N factor to compensate TMP411 measurement (see TMP411 datasheet for details)

Param.Name: I2CSlaveAddr
Param.Desc: TMP411 I2C slave address (see TMP411 datasheet for details)

Param.Name: CtrlEn
Param.Desc: Temperature function enable 0 = Disable 1 = Enable

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopTimeoutAddrOffs
Param.Desc: Timeout Address Offset. Indicates the PBC address offset associated with the first timeout occurrence. Cleared to 0x000 whenever S/W writes anything to this register.

Param.Name: DestopTimeoutRnw
Param.Desc: Timeout R/W Indicator (1=Read; 0=Write). Indicates the type of access (read or write) that was attempted when the first timeout occurred. Cleared to 0 whenever S/W writes anything to this register.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Saptr
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer. Format: Unsigned

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Mbasel
Param.Desc: Mailbox access select (See decode table (above) for details)

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Saptrhld
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer hold control

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Data
Param.Desc: Mailbox Data Port

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Saptr
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer. Format: Unsigned

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Mbasel
Param.Desc: Mailbox access select (See decode table (above) for details)

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Saptrhld
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer hold control

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Data
Param.Desc: Mailbox Data Port

Function.Name: ReadInternalRegister
Function.Desc: Reads data from an internal register of the projection module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RegisterAccessTimeoutIrq
Param.Desc: Interrupt is asserted in the scenario where a R/W access fails to complete in the allocated timeout duration.

Param.Name: InitDoneIrq
Param.Desc: FPGA and DMD initialization complete. Ready for SPI communication.

Param.Name: BrownoutIrq
Param.Desc: Brownout detected

Param.Name: VidLoopCompIrq
Param.Desc: Video loop completed. If multiple loops of a video are requested, this interrupt triggers after each completed loop.

Param.Name: VidConfigCompIrq
Param.Desc: Video configuration completed including all requested loops. This triggers once after all loops of a video complete. If both video configurations are requested to be used, it will trigger after each configuration completes (twice).

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: MainStatusSsfPllLocked
Param.Desc: Read-only status 1: SSF PLL locked 0: not locked

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: BuildNumber
Param.Desc: FPGA bitstream build number

Param.Name: VersionMajor
Param.Desc: FPGA bitstream revision

Param.Name: VersionMinor
Param.Desc: FPGA bitstream revision

Param.Name: BuildLevel
Param.Desc: FPGA bitstream build level 0: Debug release. 1+: Versioned release.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FpgaControlDifTpgEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable DIF TPG function

Param.Name: FpgaControlLdcEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable LDC led and pwm function

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DmdSflip
Param.Desc: 1: enable image flip along DMD short side

Param.Name: DmdLflip
Param.Desc: 1: enable image flip along DMD long side

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtCtrlTrcen
Param.Desc: 1: enable the DMD TRC function

Param.Name: FmtCtrlCmboutswap
Param.Desc: 1: swap comb outputs

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtCmbQueuewrn
Param.Desc: Comb queue warning

Param.Name: FmtCmbCmderr
Param.Desc: Comb command error

Param.Name: FmtCmbMulterr
Param.Desc: Comb mult error

Param.Name: FmtCmbNodataerr
Param.Desc: Comb no data error

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FmtFrbEmpty
Param.Desc: FRB empty

Param.Name: FmtFrbOverflow
Param.Desc: FRB overflow

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscSwDmdUnpark
Param.Desc: 1: run (normal DMD operation) 0: DMD park

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscParkVcclvFld
Param.Desc: park vcc/vcc2 level

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscMctrlShadowenable
Param.Desc: enable for DAD shadow mode

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlSeqen
Param.Desc: 1: sequencer enable 0: disable

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlVectincen
Param.Desc: 1: Sequence vector auto increment enable

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlSeqvect
Param.Desc: Sequence vector number

Param.Name: RscSeqctrlNumsubvect
Param.Desc: Number of sub-vector

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: SeqbufSelect
Param.Desc: 0: select sequencer buffer 0 1: buffer 1

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: RpwmDc
Param.Desc: Red PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: GpwmDc
Param.Desc: Green PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: BpwmDc
Param.Desc: Blue PWM duty cycle

Param.Name: PwmEn
Param.Desc: 1: enable PWM output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VideoFrameRate
Param.Desc: Video frame time in 40MHz clock counts

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: StartAddr1
Param.Desc: Video 1 start address in flash

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FrameCnt1
Param.Desc: Number of frames in video 1 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 frame 2 = 2 frames

Param.Name: LoopCnt1
Param.Desc: Number of times to loop video 1 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 loop 2 = 2 loops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: StartAddr2
Param.Desc: Video 2 start address in flash

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: FrameCnt2
Param.Desc: Number of frames in video 2 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 frame 2 = 2 frames

Param.Name: LoopCnt2
Param.Desc: Number of times to loop video 2 0 = Invalid 1 = 1 loop 2 = 2 loops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VidInProgress
Param.Desc: Video in progress

Param.Name: CurrConfigPtr
Param.Desc: Current video configuration pointer 0 = Video 1 1 = Video 2

Param.Name: SeqAbortErr
Param.Desc: Sequence abort error. Clears on play

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VcmMaxSeqabort
Param.Desc: Maximum number of allowable sequence aborts before video playback stops

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: VcmTmsel
Param.Desc: Video controller test mux select

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: NFactor
Param.Desc: N factor to compensate TMP411 measurement (see TMP411 datasheet for details)

Param.Name: I2CSlaveAddr
Param.Desc: TMP411 I2C slave address (see TMP411 datasheet for details)

Param.Name: CtrlEn
Param.Desc: Temperature function enable 0 = Disable 1 = Enable

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: Pass
Param.Desc: 1 = Configuration read matched expected value

Param.Name: Valid
Param.Desc: 0 = I2C temperature read failed or not completed yet 1 = I2C temperature read succeeded

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: TmpRemoteRaw
Param.Desc: DMD temperature single measurement

Param.Name: TmpRemoteFiltered
Param.Desc: DMD temperature after filtering

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: TmpLocalRaw
Param.Desc: TMP411 local temperature single measurement

Param.Name: TmpLocalFiltered
Param.Desc: TMP411 local temperature after filtering

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopTimeoutAddrOffs
Param.Desc: Timeout Address Offset. Indicates the PBC address offset associated with the first timeout occurrence. Cleared to 0x000 whenever S/W writes anything to this register.

Param.Name: DestopTimeoutRnw
Param.Desc: Timeout R/W Indicator (1=Read; 0=Write). Indicates the type of access (read or write) that was attempted when the first timeout occurred. Cleared to 0 whenever S/W writes anything to this register.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Saptr
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer. Format: Unsigned

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Mbasel
Param.Desc: Mailbox access select (See decode table (above) for details)

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Saptrhld
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer hold control

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox0Data
Param.Desc: Mailbox Data Port

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Saptr
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer. Format: Unsigned

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Mbasel
Param.Desc: Mailbox access select (See decode table (above) for details)

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Saptrhld
Param.Desc: Mailbox sub-address pointer hold control

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: DestopMbox1Data
Param.Desc: Mailbox Data Port

Member.Name: Successful
Member.Desc: A boolean value indicating if the command execution was successful.

Member.Name: Stop
Member.Desc: Stop video / Park DMD 0 = Allow video play 1 = Stop video playback and park DMD. Must be set to 0 to play video.

Member.Name: Autostop
Member.Desc: Auto-stop after playback 0 = Repeat last frame of video playback until commanded otherwise 1 = Stop and park DMD after video(s) complete

Member.Name: BufPtr
Member.Desc: Video configuration pointer 0 = Play video 1 1 = Play video 2

Member.Name: LoopConfigs
Member.Desc: Loop configuration(s) 0 = End after selected configuration if toggle buffers = 0. End after both configurations if toggle configs set to 1. 1 = Repeat configuration

Member.Name: ToggleConfigs
Member.Desc: Toggle configurations 0 = Playback will only use the selected buffer. 1 = Playback will use both buffers.
